metadata.description: Backend specs for Jeju Air AI NOTAM Analysis System v2. Adds DecisionRecord type, Decision API routes, Decision repository, Decision validation, AuditAction enum update, and Bedrock TIFRS analysis. Dashboard API critical+high filter marked as implemented.

types.name: AuditAction
types.v2_change: Added 'record-decision' value for TIFRS decision recording

seed_data.description: Korean and major Asian airports in Jeju Air network: RKSI(ICN), RKSS(GMP), RKPC(CJU), RKPK(PUS), RKTN(TAE), RKJJ(KWJ), RKJY(RSU), RJTT(NRT/HND), RJAA(NRT), RJBB(KIX), RJFF(FUK), VVNB(HAN), VTBS(BKK), RPLL(MNL), ZSSS(SHA)
Jeju Air major routes: ICN-CJU, ICN-PUS, ICN-NRT, ICN-KIX, ICN-BKK, ICN-HAN, CJU-NRT, CJU-KIX, PUS-NRT, GMP-CJU, ICN-MNL, ICN-SHA. Each with realistic waypoints on ICAO airways.
30 flights across routes with realistic 7C-prefixed flight numbers (e.g., 7C101, 7C201). Mix of scheduled, dispatched, in-flight, arrived statuses. B737-800 aircraft.

50 realistic ICAO-format NOTAMs. Mix: runway closures (QMRLC), navaid outages (QNVAS), airspace restrictions (QFALC), aerodrome changes (QMAXX), taxiway closures (QMXLC). Various FIRs: RKRR, RJJJ, VTBB, VVHN. Pre-scored with importanceScore and importanceLevel.
25 common Q-Codes with Korean descriptions and default importance levels. Covers runway, taxiway, aerodrome, navaid, airspace, lighting, ILS, SID/STAR categories.
8 REF BOOK entries linked to high/critical NOTAMs. Registered by dispatcher Kim.
5 briefings: 2 dispatcher-summary, 1 company-notam, 1 disp-comment, 1 crew-briefing. Mix of draft, approved statuses.
18 audit log entries covering view, analyze, approve, register-ref-book, generate-briefing, record-decision actions.
seed_data.v2_change: Increased from 15 to 18 entries. Added 3 record-decision audit entries linked to decision seed data.

seed_data.description: 20 pre-calculated NOTAM-route impact records linking NOTAMs to affected routes with overlap details.
25 pre-calculated NOTAM-flight impact records with temporal and spatial overlap flags.
3 dispatchers: Kim Dispatcher (morning), Lee Dispatcher (afternoon), Park Dispatcher (night).

5 TIFRS decision records linked to high/critical NOTAMs. Includes mix of decision types: no-action, monitor, route-change. Each has AI-suggested decision and dispatcher-confirmed decision. Linked to existing NOTAM seed data IDs.

db.name: InMemoryStore
db.description: Central in-memory store. Initializes from seed data on first access. Singleton pattern via module-level variable.

exports.name: getStore
exports.description: Returns singleton store instance, initializing from seed data if needed

db.v2_change: Added 'decisions: Map<string, DecisionRecord>' to store shape. Initialized from SEED_DECISIONS.

db.name: NotamRepository
db.description: NOTAM data access layer with filtering, sorting, pagination, and stats aggregation.

exports.name: findAll
exports.signature: (params: { importance?: ImportanceLevel; status?: NotamStatus; airport?: string; qCode?: string; expiryStatus?: string; sortBy?: string; order?: string; page: number; pageSize: number }) => { items: Notam[]; total: number; stats: NotamStats }
exports.description: Filtered, sorted, paginated NOTAM list with stats

exports.name: findById
exports.description: Single NOTAM by ID

exports.name: update
exports.description: Update NOTAM fields (e.g., after AI analysis)

exports.name: findAlerts
exports.description: Critical NOTAMs in new/active status

exports.name: getStats
exports.description: Aggregate statistics across all NOTAMs

exports.name: findByReplacesId
exports.description: Find replacement NOTAM for diff view

exports.name: findAlternates
exports.description: Find alternate routes by alternateRouteIds

exports.signature: (params: { status?: RefBookStatus; sortBy?: string; order?: string; page: number; pageSize: number }) => { items: RefBookEntry[]; total: number }

exports.name: findById

exports.signature: (params: { flightId?: string; type?: BriefingType; status?: BriefingStatus; sortBy?: string; order?: string; page: number; pageSize: number }) => { items: Briefing[]; total: number }

exports.name: update
exports.description: Update briefing

exports.signature: (params: { userId?: string; action?: AuditAction; targetType?: string; startDate?: string; endDate?: string; page: number; pageSize: number }) => { items: AuditLog[]; total: number }

db.name: ImpactRepository
db.description: NOTAM-route and NOTAM-flight impact record access.

exports.name: findRouteImpactsByNotam
exports.description: Route impacts for a specific NOTAM

exports.name: findFlightImpactsByNotam
exports.description: Flight impacts for a specific NOTAM

exports.name: findRouteImpactsByRoute
exports.description: All NOTAM impacts on a specific route

exports.name: findFlightImpactsByFlight
exports.description: All NOTAM impacts on a specific flight

exports.name: createRouteImpact
exports.description: Create route impact record

exports.name: createFlightImpact
exports.description: Create flight impact record

exports.name: findAll
exports.signature: (params: { notamId?: string; routeId?: string; flightId?: string }) => { routeImpacts: NotamRouteImpact[]; flightImpacts: NotamFlightImpact[] }
exports.description: Query impacts by any combination of filters

db.name: DecisionRepository
db.description: TIFRS decision record CRUD operations. Supports lookup by NOTAM ID and paginated listing.

exports.name: findAll
exports.signature: (params: { decisionType?: DecisionType; decidedBy?: string; startDate?: string; endDate?: string; sortBy?: string; order?: string; page: number; pageSize: number }) => { items: DecisionRecord[]; total: number }
exports.description: Filtered, sorted, paginated decision record list

exports.name: findById
exports.description: Single decision record by ID

exports.name: findByNotamId
exports.description: Find decision record for a specific NOTAM (one decision per NOTAM)

exports.name: create
exports.signature: (data: CreateDecisionRecordRequest & { decidedBy: string; aiSuggestedDecision: DecisionType; aiRationale: string }) => DecisionRecord
exports.description: Create new decision record with AI-suggested and dispatcher-confirmed data

exports.name: update
exports.description: Update existing decision record

services.name: BedrockService
services.description: Amazon Bedrock Claude integration for all AI features. Uses @aws-sdk/client-bedrock-runtime with InvokeModel. Real LLM calls, no mocking.

exports.name: analyzeNotamImportance
exports.signature: (notam: Notam, qCode: QCode | undefined, airport: Airport | undefined) => Promise<{ importanceScore: number; importanceLevel: ImportanceLevel; aiSummary: string; aiAnalysis: string }>
exports.description: LLM scores NOTAM importance (0-1) considering Q-Code, location context, and historical patterns. Returns score, level, Korean summary, and impact analysis text.

exports.name: generateKoreanSummary
exports.description: LLM translates cryptic NOTAM text to plain Korean. Output is a human-readable operational summary.

exports.name: generateImpactAnalysis
exports.signature: (notam: Notam, affectedRoutes: NotamRouteImpact[], affectedFlights: NotamFlightImpact[], airport: Airport | undefined) => Promise<string>
exports.description: LLM generates comprehensive impact analysis considering spatial context (runway count, location) and flight schedule.

exports.name: generateBriefingContent
exports.signature: (flight: Flight, notams: Notam[], briefingType: BriefingType) => Promise<string>
exports.description: LLM generates briefing document content. Type determines format: dispatcher-summary, company-notam, disp-comment, or crew-briefing.

exports.name: generateCrewPackage
exports.signature: (flight: Flight, notams: Notam[]) => Promise<{ dispComment: string; companyNotam: string; crewBriefing: string }>
exports.description: LLM generates complete crew briefing package with all three document types.

exports.name: generateShiftHandoverReport
exports.signature: (notams: Notam[], shiftStartTime: string, shiftEndTime: string) => Promise<string>
exports.description: LLM generates shift handover report summarizing new/changed/critical NOTAMs within the shift window.

exports.name: suggestRouteAlternatives
exports.signature: (route: Route, notam: Notam, alternateRoutes: Route[]) => Promise<{ alternatives: RouteAlternative[]; reasoning: string }>
exports.description: LLM suggests alternative routes when a NOTAM significantly impacts an active route. Compares distance and time.

exports.name: analyzeTifrsDecision
exports.signature: (notam: Notam, affectedRoutes: NotamRouteImpact[], affectedFlights: NotamFlightImpact[], airport: Airport | undefined) => Promise<{ suggestedDecision: DecisionType; tifrsTime: string; tifrsImpact: string; tifrsFacilities: string; tifrsRoute: string; tifrsSchedule: string; rationale: string }>
exports.description: LLM pre-fills TIFRS decision criteria based on NOTAM analysis. Evaluates Time impact, operational Impact severity, Facilities affected, Route segments, and Schedule disruption. Returns structured TIFRS assessment with suggested decision type and rationale.

services.name: MatchingService
services.description: Spatial-temporal matching algorithm. Calculates intersection between NOTAM circles and route polylines, considering altitude and time windows.

exports.name: calculateSpatialOverlap
exports.signature: (notam: Notam, route: Route) => { overlaps: boolean; overlapType: string; affectedSegment: string; distanceThroughArea: number; altitudeConflict: boolean }
exports.description: Checks if a route polyline (waypoint-to-waypoint segments) passes through a NOTAM's circular area. Uses great-circle distance. Checks altitude range overlap.

exports.name: calculateTemporalOverlap
exports.description: Checks if NOTAM validity period overlaps with flight schedule window.

exports.name: calculateAllImpacts
exports.description: Runs full matching for a specific NOTAM or all active NOTAMs against all routes and flights. Stores results in ImpactRepository.

exports.name: pointToSegmentDistance
exports.signature: (point: { lat: number; lng: number }, segStart: { lat: number; lng: number }, segEnd: { lat: number; lng: number }) => number
exports.description: Great-circle minimum distance from a point to a line segment (nautical miles). Core geometry function.

exports.name: haversineDistance
exports.signature: (lat1: number, lng1: number, lat2: number, lng2: number) => number
exports.description: Haversine formula for great-circle distance between two points in nautical miles.

services.name: QCodeService
services.description: Q-Code parsing and rule-based initial classification before LLM scoring.

exports.name: parseQLine
exports.signature: (qLine: string) => { fir: string; qCode: string; subject: string; condition: string; trafficType: string; purpose: string; scope: string; lowerLimit: string; upperLimit: string; coordinates: { latitude: number; longitude: number }; radius: number }
exports.description: Parses Q-line string into structured fields per ICAO format.

exports.name: classifyByQCode
exports.signature: (qCode: string) => { subject: string; condition: string; defaultImportance: ImportanceLevel; description: string; descriptionKo: string }
exports.description: Looks up Q-Code in reference table and returns rule-based classification.

services.name: NotamDiffService
services.description: Computes diff between original and replacement NOTAM.

exports.name: calculateDiff
exports.description: Compares field-by-field and returns list of changes. Compares body, effectiveFrom, effectiveTo, lowerLimit, upperLimit, coordinates, radius.

endpoints.response_type: { items: Notam[]; total: number; stats: NotamStats }
endpoints.logic: 1. Parse and validate query params. 2. Call NotamRepository.findAll() with filters. 3. Return paginated results with stats.
1. Extract id from params. 2. Call NotamRepository.findById(). 3. Return 404 if not found.

endpoints.response_type: { importanceScore: number; importanceLevel: ImportanceLevel; aiSummary: string; aiAnalysis: string }
endpoints.logic: 1. Validate request body. 2. Find NOTAM by ID. 3. Lookup Q-Code via QCodeService. 4. Lookup Airport via AirportRepository. 5. Call BedrockService.analyzeNotamImportance(). 6. Update NOTAM record with results. 7. Return analysis result.
1. Find NOTAM by ID. 2. Call BedrockService.generateKoreanSummary(). 3. Update NOTAM.aiSummary. 4. Return summary.

endpoints.response_type: { affectedRoutes: NotamRouteImpact[]; affectedFlights: NotamFlightImpact[]; contextualSeverity: string }
endpoints.logic: 1. Find NOTAM. 2. Get route/flight impacts from ImpactRepository. 3. If no impacts, run MatchingService.calculateAllImpacts(notamId). 4. Get airport context. 5. Call BedrockService.generateImpactAnalysis(). 6. Return impacts + AI severity analysis.
1. Find NOTAM. 2. Call ImpactRepository.findFlightImpactsByNotam(). 3. Return impacts.
1. Find NOTAM. 2. Call ImpactRepository.findRouteImpactsByNotam(). 3. Return impacts.

endpoints.response_type: { original: Notam; replacement: Notam; changes: DiffChange[] }
endpoints.logic: 1. Find NOTAM (replacement). 2. Find original via replacesNotamId. 3. If no replacesNotamId, find replacement via findByReplacesId. 4. Call NotamDiffService.calculateDiff(). 5. Return both NOTAMs and diff.
1. Extract NOTAM id from params. 2. Call DecisionRepository.findByNotamId(). 3. Return 404 if no decision exists for this NOTAM.

1. Validate request body. 2. Find NOTAM by id. 3. Return 404 if NOTAM not found. 4. Get route/flight impacts from ImpactRepository. 5. Get airport context from AirportRepository. 6. Call BedrockService.analyzeTifrsDecision() to get AI suggestion. 7. Call DecisionRepository.create() merging dispatcher input with AI suggestion. 8. Log 'record-decision' to AuditLogRepository. 9. Return created decision record.
1. Call NotamRepository.findAlerts() (critical NOTAMs in new/active status). 2. Return sorted by createdAt desc.
1. Call NotamRepository.getStats(). 2. Return aggregated stats.
1. Call QCodeRepository.findAll(). 2. Return all Q-Codes.
1. Parse and validate query params. 2. Call FlightRepository.findAll(). 3. Return paginated results.
1. Find flight. 2. Find route by routeId. 3. Find flight impacts. 4. Resolve affected NOTAM details. 5. Return enriched flight object.
1. Parse and validate query params. 2. Call RouteRepository.findAll(). 3. Return paginated results.
1. Find route. 2. Find route impacts. 3. Resolve NOTAM details for each impact. 4. Return enriched route.
1. Validate request. 2. Find route and NOTAM. 3. Find alternate routes. 4. Call BedrockService.suggestRouteAlternatives(). 5. Return alternatives with AI reasoning.
1. Find route. 2. Get impacts from ImpactRepository. 3. Generate summary string with count and severity info. 4. Return impacts and summary.
1. Validate request. 2. Call MatchingService.calculateAllImpacts(notamId). 3. Return newly calculated impacts.
1. Parse query params. 2. Call ImpactRepository.findAll() with filters. 3. Return matching results.
1. Parse query params. 2. Call RefBookRepository.findAll(). 3. Return paginated results.

1. Validate request body. 2. Call RefBookRepository.create() with registeredBy from auth context. 3. Update linked NOTAM status to 'ref-book-registered'. 4. Log to audit trail. 5. Return created entry.
1. Validate request body. 2. Call RefBookRepository.update(). 3. Return 404 if not found. 4. Return updated entry.
1. Call RefBookRepository.remove(). 2. Return 404 if not found. 3. Return success.
1. Parse query params. 2. Call BriefingRepository.findAll(). 3. Return paginated results.
1. Validate request. 2. Find flight. 3. Find relevant NOTAMs via impacts. 4. Call BedrockService.generateBriefingContent(). 5. Create briefing record. 6. Log to audit trail. 7. Return briefing.
1. Validate request. 2. Find flight and relevant NOTAMs. 3. Call BedrockService.generateCrewPackage(). 4. Create briefing record with crew-briefing type. 5. Return briefing.
1. Find briefing by ID. 2. Return 404 if not found.
1. Validate request. 2. Update briefing. 3. If status changes to approved, set approvedBy and approvedAt. 4. Return updated briefing.

endpoints.response_type: { dispComment: string; companyNotam: string; crewBriefing: string }
endpoints.logic: 1. Find briefing. 2. Parse content sections (content stored as JSON with keys dispComment, companyNotam, crewBriefing). 3. Return package.

1. Validate request. 2. Query NOTAMs created/changed within shift window. 3. Call BedrockService.generateShiftHandoverReport(). 4. Create briefing record with dispatcher-summary type. 5. Return briefing.
1. Find briefing by ID. 2. Return 404 if not found.

endpoints.response_type: { summary: DashboardSummary; routeImpacts: RouteImpactMapData[]; criticalNotams: Notam[] }
endpoints.logic: 1. Calculate DashboardSummary from NOTAM stats and impact counts. 2. Build RouteImpactMapData[] by joining routes, impacts, and NOTAMs. 3. If routeId specified, filter to that route. 4. Get critical AND high importance NOTAMs. 5. Return dashboard data.

v2_changes: criticalNotams now includes both critical AND high importance NOTAMs (was critical-only in v1)

endpoints.logic: 1. Parse and validate query params. 2. Call AuditLogRepository.findAll(). 3. Return paginated results.
1. Validate request body. 2. Call AuditLogRepository.create(). 3. Return created entry.

api.v2_change: Audit log query and creation now support 'record-decision' action type for FR-020 TIFRS decisions

endpoints.logic: 1. Parse and validate query params. 2. Call DecisionRepository.findAll() with filters. 3. Return paginated results.

1. Validate request body. 2. Lookup dispatcher by username from seed data. 3. Verify password (mock: any non-empty password accepted). 4. Generate mock JWT token (base64 encoded JSON). 5. Return token and user info.

middleware.description: Next.js middleware for security headers on all routes.

headers.Content-Security-Policy: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-eval' 'unsafe-inline'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: blob: https://*.tile.openstreetmap.org; connect-src 'self'; font-src 'self'

exports.name: middleware
exports.description: Adds security headers to all matched requests.

exports.name: config
exports.description: Middleware route matcher config.
